loop1.title: Power & Energy (Real-Time)
loop1.note: Showing active power and load factor — energy counters and projected demand are not measured by this UPS meter.

loop1.title: Voltage Monitor (Real-Time)
loop1.note: Showing output voltage stability — per-phase output voltage is measured; input voltage average is used for the 'Avg' KPI as a proxy for overall system voltage status.
